_comment: Lamination lanes for the DP/BP band. GENERATED by hedit/convoy/lanes_dp_bp.py from paraguayan_overrides.json. SIDECAR -- not merged into the overrides; paraguayan_server.py's merge against a new top-level key is UNVERIFIED. Y-up mm.

acceptance.note: 0 crossings is necessary, NOT sufficient (CONVOY_ALGORITHM.md 5). shapely .crosses() is False for tangent lines, so the real test is the strict nesting chain BP > lane1 > ... > laneM > DP.
